title: Main Pulse Filter (To show only Open Sub-Pulses) as the number
excerpt: The ability to use a Filter on Master Pulses as All or Individual would be useful.  For instance the FIlter could be Setup as ‘Open Pulses’  and the User would add the Status or Types they wish to it.  This could in turn…

posts.author: dazzy (Darren)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to use a Filter on Master Pulses as All or Individual would be useful. For instance the FIlter could be Setup as ‘Open Pulses’ and the User would add the Status or Types they wish to it. This could in turn by set for Master Pulses. The number next to the Master Pulse would then show ‘Open Pulses’, instead of all Pulses.
This would be very useful in case when you want to glace at Master Pulses without opening them and know how many Subs are still ‘Open’. For example you may have 40 Subs. 30 are Closed but 10 open,currently that Master Pulses would display 40. The ability to show the ‘Open’ 10 would be very helpful.
